requirement_topic.en: CREE Licensing and EDM-SA Grid-Connection — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V Firmware Settings, and Grid-Tied Project Authorisation
requirement_topic.zh: CREE许可与EDM-SA并网——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V固件参数及并网项目授权
requirement_topic.zht: CREE許可與EDM-SA併網——防孤島（IEC 62116）、50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V韌體參數及併網項目授權

summary.en: Mali's electricity sector is regulated by CREE (Commission de Régulation de l'Electricité et de l'Eau), which issues generation licences and concessions for grid-tied PV projects. The national utility EDM-SA (Énergie du Mali S.A.) operates the transmission and distribution network, and any inverter connecting to the EDM-SA grid must satisfy EDM-SA technical connection requirements. Mali's grid nominally operates at 50 Hz, 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase, consistent with the ECOWAS/West African regional standard. Key inverter grid-connection requirements include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding — inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect to prevent unintended islanding; (2) IEC 61727 characteristics of the utility interface for PV systems; (3) firmware protection thresholds (under/over-voltage, under/over-frequency, reconnection delay) must be validated against Mali's 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V grid parameters; (4) for projects above 50 kW capacity, a CREE generation licence or concession agreement is typically required before connection. EDM-SA technical requirements follow IEC references given Mali's francophone adoption of IEC standards via AMANORM. Note: EDM-SA has faced severe generation capacity deficits and load-shedding; grid stability conditions in Mali require careful protection relay setting to handle voltage and frequency excursions.
summary.zh: 马里电力行业由CREE（电力与水务监管委员会）监管，负责为并网光伏项目颁发发电许可证和特许权。国家电力公司EDM-SA（马里能源股份公司）运营输配电网络，接入EDM-SA电网的任何逆变器须满足EDM-SA技术并网要求。马里电网名义上运行于50 Hz、单相220 V和三相380 V，符合ECOWAS/西非地区标准。关键逆变器并网要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛——逆变器须检测电网失电并断开，防止无意孤岛运行；（2）IEC 61727光伏系统公用事业接口特性；（3）固件保护阈值（欠/过压、欠/过频、重连延迟）须针对马里50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V电网参数进行验证；（4）容量超过50 kW的项目通常须在并网前取得CREE发电许可证或特许权协议。EDM-SA技术要求遵循IEC参考，因马里通过AMANORM采用以法语为基础的IEC标准体系。注：EDM-SA面临严重的发电容量不足和停电问题；马里电网稳定性条件要求保护继电器整定须能应对电压和频率波动。
summary.zht: 馬里電力行業由CREE（電力與水務監管委員會）監管，負責為併網光伏項目頒發發電許可證和特許權。國家電力公司EDM-SA（馬里能源股份公司）運營輸配電網絡，接入EDM-SA電網的任何逆變器須滿足EDM-SA技術併網要求。馬里電網名義上運行於50 Hz、單相220 V和三相380 V，符合ECOWAS/西非地區標準。關鍵逆變器併網要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島——逆變器須偵測電網失電並斷開，防止無意孤島運行；（2）IEC 61727光伏系統公用事業介面特性；（3）韌體保護閾值（欠/過壓、欠/過頻、重連延遲）須針對馬里50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V電網參數進行驗證；（4）容量超過50 kW的項目通常須在併網前取得CREE發電許可證或特許權協議。EDM-SA技術要求遵循IEC參考，因馬里透過AMANORM採用以法語為基礎的IEC標準體系。注：EDM-SA面臨嚴重的發電容量不足和停電問題；馬里電網穩定性條件要求保護繼電器整定須能應對電壓和頻率波動。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (referenced in francophone West Africa IEC-aligned grid codes)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (applicable for grid-tied PV inverter connection)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
Loi n°00-019/du 02 août 2000 portant organisation du secteur de l'Electricité au Mali (Mali Electricity Sector Law) — establishes CREE regulatory authority and licensing framework
CREE — Licence de production / Concession d'exploitation (generation licence / exploitation concession required for grid-tied projects above threshold capacity)
EDM-SA technical connection conditions for grid-tied solar PV (internal utility technical requirement, IEC-referenced)

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004-2018 (inverter technical specifications), and domestic anti-islanding test results under Chinese grid conditions. The nominal grid voltage in China is 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase (50 Hz) under GB/T 156 — the same nominal voltage as Mali. However, Chinese grid-connection certificates are assessed under China's domestic standards framework and do not automatically transfer to EDM-SA or CREE technical acceptance. Chinese inverters are typically type-tested against domestic grid stability conditions, which differ materially from Mali's grid voltage and frequency excursion characteristics, particularly given EDM-SA's chronic generation deficit and load-shedding environment.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004-2018（逆变器技术规范）及中国电网条件下的国内防孤岛测试结果。中国电网名义电压依据GB/T 156为单相220 V和三相380 V（50 Hz）——与马里名义电压相同。然而，中国并网证书在中国国内标准框架下评估，不能自动转移至EDM-SA或CREE技术认可。中国逆变器通常针对国内电网稳定性条件进行型式试验，这与马里电网电压和频率波动特性存在实质差异，尤其考虑到EDM-SA长期发电不足和停电环境。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004-2018（逆變器技術規範）及中國電網條件下的國內防孤島測試結果。中國電網名義電壓依據GB/T 156為單相220 V和三相380 V（50 Hz）——與馬里名義電壓相同。然而，中國併網證書在中國國內標準框架下評估，不能自動轉移至EDM-SA或CREE技術認可。中國逆變器通常針對國內電網穩定性條件進行型式試驗，這與馬里電網電壓和頻率波動特性存在實質差異，尤其考慮到EDM-SA長期發電不足和停電環境。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156-2017 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages — China: 220/380 V at 50 Hz)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents are not accepted as EDM-SA or CREE compliance evidence. Key gaps include: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory — Chinese domestic anti-islanding test results under GB/T conditions are not equivalent; (b) IEC 61727 grid interface compliance evidence for the Mali 220/380 V 50 Hz grid; (c) CREE generation licence or concession obtained before commissioning any grid-tied project above the applicable threshold capacity; (d) firmware protection thresholds (voltage trip points, frequency trip points, reconnection delays) configured and validated for Mali's 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V grid — particularly important given EDM-SA's voltage and frequency excursion patterns under generation deficit conditions; (e) for donor/IPP-financed projects (World Bank, AfDB, EU), lender technical specifications typically require IEC-referenced equipment certification — Chinese GB/T certificates are not sufficient. While Mali's nominal voltage (220/380 V) matches China's GB/T 156 voltage, the grid instability characteristics and the IEC-referenced regulatory framework mean Chinese grid documents cannot be substituted without supplementary IEC evidence.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不被EDM-SA或CREE接受为合规证据。主要差距包括：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛型式试验报告——中国GB/T条件下的国内防孤岛测试结果不等同；（b）针对马里220/380 V 50 Hz电网的IEC 61727电网接口合规证据；（c）在任何超过适用门槛容量的并网项目调试前须取得CREE发电许可证或特许权；（d）固件保护阈值（电压跳闸点、频率跳闸点、重连延迟）须针对马里50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V电网进行配置和验证——考虑到EDM-SA在发电不足条件下的电压和频率波动特性尤为重要；（e）对于捐助方/独立发电商融资项目（世界银行、非洲开发银行、欧盟），贷款方技术规格通常要求IEC参考设备认证——中国GB/T证书不足以满足要求。尽管马里名义电压（220/380 V）与中国GB/T 156电压相同，但电网不稳定特性和IEC参考监管框架意味着中国电网文件不能在没有补充IEC证据的情况下替代。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不被EDM-SA或CREE接受為合規證據。主要差距包括：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島型式試驗報告——中國GB/T條件下的國內防孤島測試結果不等同；（b）針對馬里220/380 V 50 Hz電網的IEC 61727電網介面合規證據；（c）在任何超過適用門檻容量的併網項目調試前須取得CREE發電許可證或特許權；（d）韌體保護閾值（電壓跳閘點、頻率跳閘點、重連延遲）須針對馬里50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V電網進行配置和驗證——考慮到EDM-SA在發電不足條件下的電壓和頻率波動特性尤為重要；（e）對於捐助方/獨立發電商融資項目（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、歐盟），貸款方技術規格通常要求IEC參考設備認證——中國GB/T證書不足以滿足要求。儘管馬里名義電壓（220/380 V）與中國GB/T 156電壓相同，但電網不穩定特性和IEC參考監管框架意味著中國電網文件不能在沒有補充IEC證據的情況下替代。

mandatory_status.target: CREE generation licence mandatory for grid-tied projects above threshold capacity; EDM-SA technical connection conditions mandatory for grid connection; IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance mandatory in practice for any grid-tied inverter under IEC-referenced AMANORM/EDM-SA framework; donor/lender IEC equipment specifications binding for financed projects
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements under GB/T framework but does not transfer to CREE / EDM-SA / AMANORM acceptance in Mali

source.publisher: CREE — Commission de Régulation de l'Electricité et de l'Eau (Mali)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mali's CREE licensing and EDM-SA grid-connection framework requires IEC-referenced compliance evidence — Chinese GB/T grid certificates are not accepted. Obtain CREE generation licence or concession before commissioning grid-tied projects above the applicable capacity threshold. Obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. Validate inverter firmware protection settings for Mali's 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V grid and for EDM-SA's voltage and frequency excursion conditions. Verify current CREE licensing thresholds and EDM-SA technical connection requirements directly with CREE and EDM-SA before project commitment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马里CREE许可和EDM-SA并网框架要求IEC参考合规证据——中国GB/T并网证书不被接受。在超过适用容量门槛的并网项目调试前须取得CREE发电许可证或特许权。从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727测试证据。针对马里50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V电网及EDM-SA电压和频率波动条件验证逆变器固件保护整定。在项目承诺前直接向CREE和EDM-SA核实现行CREE许可门槛和EDM-SA技术并网要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬里CREE許可和EDM-SA併網框架要求IEC參考合規證據——中國GB/T併網證書不被接受。在超過適用容量門檻的併網項目調試前須取得CREE發電許可證或特許權。從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727測試證據。針對馬里50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V電網及EDM-SA電壓和頻率波動條件驗證逆變器韌體保護整定。在項目承諾前直接向CREE和EDM-SA核實現行CREE許可門檻和EDM-SA技術併網要求。

requirement_topic.en: AMADER Off-Grid / Mini-Grid Electrification — IEC TS 62257 Quality Standards and Donor/Lender Procurement Specifications
requirement_topic.zh: AMADER离网/微电网电气化——IEC TS 62257质量标准及捐助方/贷款方采购规格
requirement_topic.zht: AMADER離網/微電網電氣化——IEC TS 62257質量標準及捐助方/貸款方採購規格

summary.en: A large share of Mali's solar PV deployment is in off-grid and mini-grid systems serving rural electrification, given EDM-SA's low national electrification rate and severe generation deficit. AMADER (Agence Malienne pour le Développement de l'Energie Domestique et de l'Electrification Rurale) is the government agency responsible for rural electrification and manages mini-grid concessions and solar home system programmes in areas outside the EDM-SA grid. AMADER programmes and associated donor/lender-financed projects (World Bank ROGEP/ECREEE, AfDB, EU, IFC, bilateral donors) typically require: (a) inverters and charge controllers meeting IEC TS 62257 series (Recommendations for small renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification) quality standards; (b) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence; (c) IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence for grid-forming mini-grid inverters where applicable; (d) IP54 or higher enclosure rating for dusty Sahel environments (IEC 60529); (e) thermal performance verified to ambient temperatures of at least 40 °C (and commonly 45–50 °C in northern Mali Sahel zones); (f) donor/lender-specific quality standards such as World Bank ESMAP Quality Standards, Lighting Global Quality Standards for off-grid solar, or Efficiency for Access Coalition standards where applicable. Chinese off-grid inverters meeting only GB/T domestic standards without IEC TS 62257 or IEC 62109 evidence are typically rejected in AMADER and donor-financed procurement.
summary.zh: 马里大量太阳能光伏部署用于离网和微电网系统，服务于农村电气化，这是因为EDM-SA全国电气化率低且发电严重不足。AMADER（马里国内能源开发与农村电气化局）是负责农村电气化的政府机构，管理EDM-SA电网覆盖范围外地区的微电网特许权和太阳能家庭系统计划。AMADER计划及相关捐助方/贷款方融资项目（世界银行ROGEP/ECREEE、非洲开发银行、欧盟、国际金融公司、双边捐助方）通常要求：（a）逆变器和充电控制器符合IEC TS 62257系列（农村电气化小型可再生能源和混合系统建议）质量标准；（b）IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据；（c）适用时并网型微电网逆变器的IEC 62116防孤岛证据；（d）针对萨赫勒沙尘环境的IP54或更高防护等级（IEC 60529）；（e）经验证的热性能至少达到40 °C环境温度（马里北部萨赫勒地区通常为45–50 °C）；（f）适用时的捐助方/贷款方特定质量标准，如世界银行ESMAP质量标准、离网太阳能照明全球质量标准或能效联盟标准。仅符合GB/T国内标准而无IEC TS 62257或IEC 62109证据的中国离网逆变器通常在AMADER和捐助方融资采购中被拒绝。
summary.zht: 馬里大量太陽能光伏部署用於離網和微電網系統，服務於農村電氣化，這是因為EDM-SA全國電氣化率低且發電嚴重不足。AMADER（馬里國內能源開發與農村電氣化局）是負責農村電氣化的政府機構，管理EDM-SA電網覆蓋範圍外地區的微電網特許權和太陽能家庭系統計畫。AMADER計畫及相關捐助方/貸款方融資項目（世界銀行ROGEP/ECREEE、非洲開發銀行、歐盟、國際金融公司、雙邊捐助方）通常要求：（a）逆變器和充電控制器符合IEC TS 62257系列（農村電氣化小型可再生能源和混合系統建議）質量標準；（b）IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據；（c）適用時併網型微電網逆變器的IEC 62116防孤島證據；（d）針對薩赫勒沙塵環境的IP54或更高防護等級（IEC 60529）；（e）經驗證的熱性能至少達到40 °C環境溫度（馬里北部薩赫勒地區通常為45–50 °C）；（f）適用時的捐助方/貸款方特定質量標準，如世界銀行ESMAP質量標準、離網太陽能照明全球質量標準或能效聯盟標準。僅符合GB/T國內標準而無IEC TS 62257或IEC 62109證據的中國離網逆變器通常在AMADER和捐助方融資採購中被拒絕。

standards_or_laws: IEC TS 62257 series — Recommendations for small renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification (multiple parts covering off-grid inverters, charge controllers, mini-grid systems)
IEC 62109-1/-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems (Parts 1 and 2)
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP54 minimum commonly specified for Sahel dust environments
IEC 60721-3-4 — Classification of environmental conditions — Stationary use at non-weatherprotected locations (dust class 4S relevant to Sahel)
Lighting Global Quality Standards — off-grid solar quality standards (applicable for solar home systems and small off-grid products)
World Bank ESMAP / ROGEP programme quality standards (applicable to financed off-grid/mini-grid projects in Mali)
AMADER — Agence Malienne pour le Développement de l'Energie Domestique et de l'Electrification Rurale (rural electrification concession authority)

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to IEC TS 62257 for off-grid rural electrification systems. Chinese off-grid and hybrid inverter products are assessed under GB/T 37408-2019 (grid-connected inverters) or various domestic energy storage and off-grid standards, none of which are harmonised with IEC TS 62257. Chinese manufacturers supplying off-grid inverters to AMADER or donor-financed projects in Mali frequently encounter rejection when documentation is limited to Chinese GB/T certificates, as these do not satisfy IEC TS 62257 quality evidence requirements, do not address Sahel environmental derating, and do not constitute Lighting Global or equivalent donor quality certification.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接对应IEC TS 62257的离网农村电气化系统标准。中国离网和混合逆变器产品依据GB/T 37408-2019（并网逆变器）或各类国内储能和离网标准进行评估，上述标准均未与IEC TS 62257协调。向AMADER或马里捐助方融资项目供应离网逆变器的中国制造商，在文件仅限于中国GB/T证书时，经常遭遇拒绝，因为这些证书不满足IEC TS 62257质量证据要求，不涉及萨赫勒环境降额，也不构成照明全球或同等捐助方质量认证。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接對應IEC TS 62257的離網農村電氣化系統標準。中國離網和混合逆變器產品依據GB/T 37408-2019（併網逆變器）或各類國內儲能和離網標準進行評估，上述標準均未與IEC TS 62257協調。向AMADER或馬里捐助方融資項目供應離網逆變器的中國製造商，在文件僅限於中國GB/T證書時，經常遭遇拒絕，因為這些證書不滿足IEC TS 62257質量證據要求，不涉及薩赫勒環境降額，也不構成照明全球或同等捐助方質量認證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters — covers grid-connected inverters, not specifically off-grid rural electrification systems)
GB/T 19064-2003 — 家用太阳能光伏电源系统技术条件和试验方法 (Technical conditions and test methods for household solar PV power supply systems — domestic standard, not harmonised with IEC TS 62257)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese domestic off-grid inverter certifications do not satisfy AMADER programme requirements or donor/lender IEC TS 62257 procurement specifications. Exporters targeting Mali off-grid and mini-grid projects must: (a) obtain IEC TS 62257 series compliance evidence for the relevant system type (off-grid inverter, charge controller, hybrid system); (b) obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (c) verify IP rating is at least IP54 (IEC 60529) for Sahel dust conditions, and confirm thermal derating to at least 45 °C ambient — Chinese standard test temperature (25 °C or 40 °C max) is frequently insufficient for Mali field conditions; (d) check whether the specific programme (AMADER concession, World Bank ROGEP, AfDB-financed, EU-EDF) requires Lighting Global quality certification or equivalent donor-accepted quality standard; (e) prepare French-language technical documentation (Manuel d'installation, Fiche technique) consistent with Mali's francophone regulatory environment. Sahel field conditions frequently cause inverter failures in products that passed Chinese domestic laboratory tests — thermal and dust derating evidence is a material practical gap beyond the standards gap.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内离网逆变器认证不满足AMADER计划要求或捐助方/贷款方IEC TS 62257采购规格。面向马里离网和微电网项目的出口商须：（a）取得相关系统类型（离网逆变器、充电控制器、混合系统）的IEC TS 62257系列合规证据；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证书；（c）核实防护等级至少为IP54（IEC 60529），适用于萨赫勒沙尘条件，并确认至少45 °C环境温度的热降额——中国标准测试温度（25 °C或最高40 °C）通常不足以反映马里现场条件；（d）检查特定计划（AMADER特许权、世界银行ROGEP、非洲开发银行融资、欧盟欧洲发展基金）是否要求照明全球质量认证或同等捐助方认可质量标准；（e）准备法语技术文件（安装手册、技术规格表），符合马里法语监管环境。萨赫勒现场条件经常导致通过了中国国内实验室测试的产品出现逆变器故障——热降额和沙尘防护证据是超越标准差距的实质性实际差距。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內離網逆變器認證不滿足AMADER計畫要求或捐助方/貸款方IEC TS 62257採購規格。面向馬里離網和微電網項目的出口商須：（a）取得相關系統類型（離網逆變器、充電控制器、混合系統）的IEC TS 62257系列合規證據；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證書；（c）核實防護等級至少為IP54（IEC 60529），適用於薩赫勒沙塵條件，並確認至少45 °C環境溫度的熱降額——中國標準測試溫度（25 °C或最高40 °C）通常不足以反映馬里現場條件；（d）檢查特定計畫（AMADER特許權、世界銀行ROGEP、非洲開發銀行融資、歐盟歐洲發展基金）是否要求照明全球質量認證或同等捐助方認可質量標準；（e）準備法語技術文件（安裝手冊、技術規格表），符合馬里法語監管環境。薩赫勒現場條件經常導致通過了中國國內實驗室測試的產品出現逆變器故障——熱降額和沙塵防護證據是超越標準差距的實質性實際差距。

mandatory_status.target: IEC TS 62257 compliance and IEC 62109 safety evidence are mandatory gate conditions in AMADER programme and donor/lender-financed project procurement; IP54+ and 45 °C thermal derating mandatory in practice for Sahel field conditions; Lighting Global or equivalent quality certification required for donor-funded solar home system programmes
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic off-grid standards are recognised under China's NEA rural electrification programme framework but do not transfer to AMADER programme eligibility or donor/lender project acceptance in Mali

source.publisher: AMADER — Agence Malienne pour le Développement de l'Energie Domestique et de l'Electrification Rurale

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mali off-grid and mini-grid projects under AMADER programmes and donor/lender financing require IEC TS 62257 quality evidence and IEC 62109-1/-2 safety certificates — Chinese GB/T domestic certificates are not accepted. Verify IP54+ and 45 °C (or higher) thermal derating documentation for Mali Sahel field conditions. Check whether the specific project programme requires Lighting Global quality certification or equivalent. Prepare French-language technical documentation. Confirm current AMADER programme requirements and donor quality standards directly with the project implementing agency before committing equipment to AMADER or donor-financed procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在AMADER计划和捐助方/贷款方融资下的马里离网和微电网项目要求IEC TS 62257质量证据和IEC 62109-1/-2安全证书——中国GB/T国内证书不被接受。核实马里萨赫勒现场条件的IP54+和45 °C（或更高）热降额文件。检查特定项目计划是否要求照明全球质量认证或同等认证。准备法语技术文件。在将设备用于AMADER或捐助方融资采购前，直接向项目实施机构确认AMADER计划当前要求和捐助方质量标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在AMADER計畫和捐助方/貸款方融資下的馬里離網和微電網項目要求IEC TS 62257質量證據和IEC 62109-1/-2安全證書——中國GB/T國內證書不被接受。核實馬里薩赫勒現場條件的IP54+和45 °C（或更高）熱降額文件。檢查特定項目計畫是否要求照明全球質量認證或同等認證。準備法語技術文件。在將設備用於AMADER或捐助方融資採購前，直接向項目實施機構確認AMADER計畫當前要求和捐助方質量標準。
